_note: docs/46 Phase 3 (2026-07-12): ledger import-boundary ratchet. Files outside modules/ledger that reference the journalEntries/journalLines Drizzle tables are grandfathered here; the set may only SHRINK. New GL reads go through LedgerReadService (accountNet/cashPosition/entryRefNo) — or add an equally narrow method there — and postings via LedgerService.postEntry. Some grandfathered reads are by design and expected to stay (finance reconcileControls REC-04 reads both sides of the reconciliation independently; consolidation's group eliminations); the rest are Phase 3+ migration candidates. Drop a file here in the same PR that removes its direct reads (--update regenerates). Round 6b (2026-07-17): six tie-out consumers migrated to the narrow LedgerReadService (accountGross gross-debit/credit read + entryRefNo status option added) — assets (FA-09 draft-disposal lookup), leases + lessor-leases (2600/1610 GL-vs-schedule recon), payroll (PAY-02 liability schedule), inventory-ledger (sub-ledger vs GL control tie), commitments (budget actuals). 21 -> 15.
